name: default
description: JSON sibling of the design-system template: the design tokens as machine-readable data — swatches (token, hex), a type scale (name, size), spacing tokens (label, value), and core components (name, specimen). The agent expands each exemplar array entry.

slots.description: Color swatches; expand the exemplar object per token.
Type-scale steps; expand the exemplar object per step.
Spacing tokens; expand the exemplar object per token.
Core components; expand the exemplar object per component.
